title: Collapse All Folders Function Was Removed - Kindly Bring it Back!

posts.author: dfulkerson (Deborah F)
posts.cookedHtml:
As “Members”, we have been collapsing our many folders for a year now, so that we can expediently find the ones we need in an ever-increasingly long list of folders.

Suddenly, the function has become unavailable. I understand the function was removed for Members. Productivity is dropping as a result of having to scroll more to find what we need.

Please bring “collapse all folders” back to the Members.

Thank you.
